docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $655.30 FILED BY CARR JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL LIZETTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
